i am not in new york as i would have been glad to

--- junkermann@elseworthltd.com wrote:

jeffrey,

I hope this finds you well.
As you ignored me while I was in new york I could
not apologise personally.I know you do not accept
apologies but I would not like to loose a friendship
over this so I hope for your understanding.
Best
Nic

-----Original Message-----
From: J. Epstein [mailto:jeeproject@yahoo.com]

I hope this finds you well... When you said our
dealings were only one-way,, you were right,,,
after
spending a considerable amount of time... reading
your
ppm and then talking to both you and your
partner...
giving it to the best investment lawyer in new
york,
and sending you the comments.. I have yet to
receive a
minimal "thank you"// IF our friendship isn't
enough
for you to follow even the most basic courtesies, I
would have hoped that by now ,, your understanding
of
business , would require some minimal diligence.,,,
I
am very disturbed by the gangrenous nature of both.
